name: sakura
when_to_use: 需要自然旋转、横向吹拂且可换渐变色的春季花瓣雨时用它而非手写 CSS 花瓣,因为原生在多段风摆、随机尺寸与持续生成清理上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能做同速下落的粉色椭圆,做不到九组摆动、四组风向、随机尺寸/渐变和离屏回收的自然组合;该库把长期调参固化为一个构造器。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need spring petals that fall with natural rotation and crosswind, with configurable gradient colors, instead of hand-writing CSS petals. Native implementations fail on multi-stage wind sway, randomized sizes, and continuous generation and cleanup.
en.why_valuable: AI can only make pink ellipses fall at one speed by default. It cannot naturally combine nine sway groups, four wind directions, randomized size and gradients, and off-screen recycling. This library packages long-term tuning in one constructor.

data_in.note: data_in.options is passed exactly to new Sakura(selector, options). Keep className at its default sakura to match the official CSS.

options?.className?: string - petal class name, default 'sakura'; when renamed, the consumer must provide matching CSS
options?.fallSpeed?: number - larger values fall more slowly, default 1
options?.delay?: integer - interval between new petals in milliseconds, default 300

colors?._default: the array contains only this item by default

spec.note: The target container explicitly uses a default height of 400px with position:relative/overflow:hidden. Upstream horizontal coordinates and durations still reference the current iframe viewport, so the container should occupy the available width. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in._why_no_example: 参数浅且构造器默认完整,裁剪 schema 足以校准,不附 minimal example。
data_in.note: data_in.options 精确传给 new Sakura(selector, options);className 保留默认 sakura 以匹配官方 CSS。

options?.className?: string —— 花瓣类名,默认 'sakura';改名时消费端必须同步提供同类 CSS
options?.fallSpeed?: number —— 越大下落越慢,默认 1
options?.maxSize?: integer —— 最大像素尺寸,默认 14
options?.minSize?: integer —— 最小像素尺寸,默认 10
options?.delay?: integer —— 新花瓣间隔毫秒数,默认 300

spec.note: 目标容器显式使用默认 400px 高并设 position:relative/overflow:hidden;上游横向坐标与时长仍参考当前 iframe viewport,故容器宜占满可用宽度,禁用 vh/百分比高。

boot.widget: unsupported:sakura-js@1 的发布脚本只接受 document.querySelector 可见的字符串 selector,不能定位 shadowRoot 内节点;官方 CSS 也不能仅放入 shadow 后作用于其 light-DOM 花瓣。
boot.note: 事实校准:固定版本 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sakura-js@1/+esm 实际只返回 bundle 注释与 sourcemap、没有任何导出,不能伪造 default import;上面的 dist/sakura.min.js 与 dist/sakura.min.css 是 1.1.1 发布包中的真实官方路径。

carriers.widget: unsupported:构造器依赖 document.querySelector,无法原生挂载 shadow 内节点;CSS 也不是 shadow-aware
carriers.codex: conditional:sandbox iframe 需允许固定 jsDelivr classic script 与 CSS;全局 Sakura 与样式被 iframe 隔离

isolation.evidence: sakura-js@1.1.1 dist/sakura.min.js: 'var Sakura=function(t,e){this.el=document.querySelector(t)...}'. Petals created with document.createElement('div') and appended to this.el (the target, set position:relative/overflow:hidden by boot) — not document.body/head; library injects no style (CSS loaded by boot <link>). Render loop uses window.requestAnimationFrame with window.cancelAnimationFrame cleanup (stop()); the only addEventListener is animationend on individual petal elements — no window/document resize/scroll listener. Constructor's document.querySelector(selector) cannot resolve shadow-internal nodes and .sakura CSS targets light-DOM petals -> shadow-incompatible.
